macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and major altcoins fell ahead of the Fed meeting
items.summary: Crypto market commentary from the past day said Bitcoin was down about 3% while ETH, SOL, and XRP were each down about 4% as traders braced for the FOMC meeting. The same report noted some relative strength in tokens such as UNI, HYPE, and Worldcoin despite the broader weakness.

items.title: Bitcoin saw a sharp drop after market expectations shifted on rates
items.summary: A crypto market update said Bitcoin fell from around 66.5K after the Federal Reserve meeting, with traders increasingly pricing in more restrictive rate expectations. The video framed the move as a downside rejection tied to the post-FOMC macro backdrop.

items.title: Illinois passed a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions, including wallet transfers
items.summary: A crypto news segment reported that Illinois Governor JB Pritzker signed a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions into law, extending to transfers between personal wallets. The report also linked the move to broader debate over state-level crypto regulation in the U.S.

items.title: Trace Finance raised $32 million in a Series A for stablecoin payments infrastructure
items.summary: One project-development item highlighted stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance closing a $32 million Series A round. The company said its valuation had grown roughly 10x since its 2022 seed round, according to the report.

items.title: Uniswap gained after Standard Chartered linked tokenized-stock use cases
items.summary: A market roundup said Uniswap was one of the day’s standout winners after Standard Chartered noted it could lead in tokenized stock trading. The same commentary suggested other DeFi and AI-related tokens were also attracting speculative interest.

items.title: Hyperliquid continued to attract strong trader interest
items.summary: Recent crypto commentary said traders were still bidding Hyperliquid even as other markets were volatile, with one segment calling it a top radar name. The coverage framed HYPE as benefiting from its trading volume and buyback mechanics.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Android 17 and Wear OS 7 begin rolling out to Pixel devices
items.summary: Google has started shipping Android 17 to Pixel smartphones, adding features such as built-in screen recording in the camera, multitasking app bubbles, and stronger biometric security. Wear OS 7 is also available now, making this one of the day’s biggest consumer software updates.

items.title: Snap unveils $2,195 Specs augmented reality glasses
items.summary: Snap introduced its new Specs augmented reality glasses, highlighting a large display for navigation and other on-the-go tasks. The high price makes the launch notable as a premium hardware move in the AR wearables market.

items.title: Google opens preorders for next-gen Home speaker with Gemini smart features
items.summary: Google has opened preorders for a $99.99 smart speaker that replaces the aging Nest Audio. The device includes Gemini for Home, signaling a major refresh of Google’s smart-home hardware lineup.

items.title: Microsoft rolls out a Windows search fix for Insiders
items.summary: Microsoft released a search update for Windows Insiders that improves typo handling and partial-word searches. The change is a smaller but practical Windows platform update focused on usability.

items.title: Florida sues TikTok over child account protections
items.summary: Florida filed a lawsuit accusing TikTok of allowing children under 14 to create accounts and misleading parents about age-appropriate safety. The case adds to broader regulatory pressure on major social platforms.

items.title: Apple faces potential price increases as chip costs rise
items.summary: BBC reports that Apple may raise prices as the chip boom pushes component costs higher. If passed on to consumers, this could affect upcoming Apple hardware pricing across its product lines.

items.title: Guernsey begins island-wide 5G rollout
items.summary: BBC reports that a telecom firm has begun an island-wide 5G rollout in Guernsey. The deployment is a notable regional infrastructure development for mobile connectivity.
